creator: Lena@lena.kiev.ua
text:
> What does "make -V LD" print?

/usr/ports/emulators/wine # make -V LD
/usr/local/bin/ld
/usr/ports/emulators/wine # pkg_which /usr/local/bin/ld
binutils-2.24

~ $ pkg_tree
...
gcc-4.7.3
|\__ gmp-5.1.3_1
|\__ mpfr-3.1.2_1
|\__ mpc-1.0.2
|\__ binutils-2.24
 \__ libiconv-1.14_3
...
